expectations.text: Uses shadcn/ui Table components (Table, TableHeader, TableBody, TableRow, TableHead, TableCell)
expectations.evidence: Lines 6-12: imports Table, TableBody, TableCaption, TableCell, TableHead, TableHeader, TableRow from @/components/ui/table

expectations.text: Uses shadcn/ui DropdownMenu for row actions
Includes TypeScript interface or type for the user data
expectations.evidence: Lines 27-36: UserRole, UserStatus types and User interface. Also SortField, SortDirection, SortConfig.

expectations.text: Implements sorting logic for at least one column
expectations.evidence: Lines 97-116: handleSort toggles asc/desc/null, sortedUsers useMemo with localeCompare. All 4 columns are sortable.
